Test if the event screen shows that geolocation is required when the event requires it
geolocationRequirementSavedTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if creating an event with geolocation enabled saves the requirement in the database

gets the user's account type

Returns the comment document ID.

Loads all comments for the specified event and returns them in a flattened threaded order sorted by score.

getter for Event Description

returns the amount of entrants for a given status
